title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Parle Products - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Parle Products - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Parle Products has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Jodhpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Parle Products:
Parle Products is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Parle Products!
